## Summary

Describe the behavior, implementation, or documentation change.

## Verification

- [ ] I updated the shared specification/vectors when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated every affected native implementation.
- [ ] `scripts/verify-all.sh` passes, or I documented the unavailable platform gate.
- [ ] I used only published test material and added no real wallet secrets.
- [ ] I added no runtime network access, telemetry, or invented extended-key prefix.
